gate.note: Iteration 1: establishing baseline. Budget exceeded but no prior baseline to regress against. REGRESSION.json emitted for tracking.

regression.detail: First run — no baseline to compare. Current 25.5s exceeds 15s target. Top hotspots: plan-exec-gate.test.ts (6.7s), batch-validation.test.ts (3.2s), audit.test.ts (3.0s)
